summary: Matched several small Sheik down-special functions in ftSk_SpecialLw by replacing nonmatching markers with straightforward animation, collision, and physics wrappers, plus the needed local prototypes/includes. decomp.dev reported 6 new full matches totaling +336 bytes and small progress in two still-unmatched helper functions.

key_files.role: Replaced several /// # nonmatching markers with matched C implementations for Sheik SpecialLw animation, collision, and physics functions.
Added prototypes for helper functions called by the newly matched collision wrappers.

what_changed: Added a self-include of "ftSeak/ftSk_SpecialLw.h" and included "ft/ft_0C88.h" in ftSk_SpecialLw.c.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialAirLw_Anim: gets the Fighter with GET_FIGHTER, checks ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining, and sets fp->accessory4_cb to fn_8011412C when the animation finishes.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialLw_Coll: calls ft_80082708 and dispatches to ftSk_SpecialLw_8011444C when the result is GA_Ground.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialAirLw_Coll: calls ft_80081D0C and dispatches to ftSk_SpecialLw_801144B8 when the result is not GA_Ground.
Changed ftSk_SpecialLw_8011444C and ftSk_SpecialLw_801144B8 from nonmatching markers to empty function bodies, producing small partial matching improvements rather than full matches.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialAirLw2_Anim: checks for animation completion and calls ftCo_800CC730.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialLw2_Phys as a direct call to ft_80084F3C.
Implemented ftSk_SpecialAirLw2_Coll: calls ft_80081D0C and dispatches to ftSk_SpecialLw_801146EC when the result is not GA_Ground.
Added header declarations for ftSk_SpecialLw_8011444C, ftSk_SpecialLw_801144B8, and ftSk_SpecialLw_801146EC.
smart_moves: Targeted small, structurally obvious callbacks and state handlers where the C equivalent is mostly a condition plus one helper call, yielding several easy 100% matches.
Used existing fighter helper APIs and casts consistently: HSD_GObj* inputs are cast to Fighter_GObj* for ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining, ft_80082708, ft_80081D0C, ftCo_800CC730, and ft_80084F3C.
Preserved unresolved helper names with address-style suffixes instead of guessing semantic names before the helper bodies were understood.
Added only the prototypes and includes needed to support the new calls, keeping the PR narrow.
decomp_lessons: For fighter special-move files, animation-end handlers often match as a simple ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining(...) == 0 guard followed by either a callback assignment or a state-transition helper call.
Ground/air collision handlers can often be recovered as thin wrappers around shared collision/environment helpers, comparing the result to GA_Ground and dispatching to a ground/air transition helper.
Empty functions can be worth committing when they replace nonmatching markers and produce measurable partial progress, but they should remain address-named if their semantic purpose is not yet clear.
Self-including the corresponding header in a .c file helps keep newly added declarations consistent and exposes prototype issues early.
naming_conventions: Sheik fighter functions use the ftSk_ prefix in this file.
Ground and air variants are distinguished as SpecialLw versus SpecialAirLw.
Second-phase move handlers use the SpecialLw2 and SpecialAirLw2 suffixes.
Standard fighter action callbacks retain suffixes like _Anim, _IASA, _Phys, and _Coll.
Unidentified internal helpers remain address-suffixed, e.g. ftSk_SpecialLw_8011444C, ftSk_SpecialLw_801144B8, and ftSk_SpecialLw_801146EC.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Match tiny functions by reducing them to exact conditional structure: equality against zero for ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining and equality/inequality against GA_Ground for collision checks.
Use GET_FIGHTER only when the implementation needs the Fighter* field access, as in setting accessory4_cb.
Use Fighter_GObj* casts for common fighter engine helpers that expect that type, even when the public callback signature is HSD_GObj*.
Leave unresolved callee bodies as empty functions or address-named prototypes when the immediate wrapper can still be matched.
review_feedback: No human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.
decomp.dev reported matched code increased by +0.01% / +336 bytes for GALE01.
decomp.dev listed 6 new 100% matches: ftSk_SpecialAirLw_Anim, ftSk_SpecialLw_Coll, ftSk_SpecialAirLw_Coll, ftSk_SpecialAirLw2_Anim, ftSk_SpecialAirLw2_Coll, and ftSk_SpecialLw2_Phys.
decomp.dev listed small improvements in unmatched functions ftSk_SpecialLw_8011444C and ftSk_SpecialLw_801144B8.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that match ftSk_SpecialLw_8011444C, ftSk_SpecialLw_801144B8, or ftSk_SpecialLw_801146EC.
Search for other fighter SpecialLw files using the same ftAnim_IsFramesRemaining-to-accessory4_cb pattern.
Compare Sheik ground/air collision wrappers against Zelda transform or other character special-move collision handlers for reusable structure.
